====Pokémon====
{{anchor|Abomasnow 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Abomasnow
|gender=female
|type1=Grass
|type2=Ice
|img=Candice Abomasnow Adventures.png
|epnum=PS386
|epname=Disagreeable Graveler
|desc={{p|Abomasnow}} is one of Candice's main Pokémon. She was first seen when Platinum had bumped into a {{p|Graveler}} while skiing. She took her to the [[Snowpoint City|city]] so she could rest. Afterwards, she was used in her Gym match and was Candice's third Pokémon against Platinum's newly caught {{TP|Platinum|Lopunny}}. Despite being an inexperienced member of her team, Lopunny was swiftly able to avoid the massive Pokémon's Focus Blasts, and defeated her with a nimble {{m|Jump Kick}}.

Abomasnow's known moves are {{m|Ice Shard}}, {{m|Focus Blast}}, and {{m|Rock Climb}}, and her Ability is {{a|Snow Warning}}.}}

{{anchor|Snover 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Candice
|pkmn=Snover
|gender=female
|type1=Grass
|type2=Ice
|img=Candice Snover Adventures.png
|epnum=PS387
|epname=Striking Out Snover
|desc={{p|Snover}} was the first Pokémon used by Candice during her Gym battle against {{adv|Platinum}} against her {{TP|Platinum|Empoleon}}. Due to her opponent's Steel-type advantage, she was quickly defeated by a powerful {{m|Metal Claw}}, however, before she fainted, she had fired a {{m|Seed Bomb}}, which hit the Emperor Pokémon in the head, defeating her.

Snover's only known move is {{m|Seed Bomb}}, and her Ability is {{a|Snow Warning}}.}}
